# Task Graph Summary

## Objective
Build a restaurant software foundation using FastAPI with a visual dashboard powered by Chart.js and Three.js.

## Workstream Flow
1. Define restaurant domain scope: menu, orders, tables, billing, inventory, and staff workflow.
2. Implement backend modules and APIs in FastAPI with clear schema and service boundaries.
3. Add dashboard UI for KPI tracking using Chart.js (2D metrics) and Three.js (3D activity view).
4. Validate core flows with targeted tests and quick runtime checks.
5. Iterate on usability, performance, and deployment readiness.

## Deliverables
- Custom agent configured for restaurant-focused development.
- Dashboard scaffold with chart and 3D visualization.
- Documentation stubs for planning and technical specification.

## Current Status
Planning and dashboard scaffolding completed, ready for backend module implementation and data integration.
